## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / tool

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all` (run from `crates/`)
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets` passes
- [ ] `cargo test` passes
- [ ] Docs updated if public behaviour changed
- [ ] Benchmarks / performance impact noted (if relevant)
